action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Mayadev, Andraca, Bare, Brown, Clancy, DeSanto, Dittrich, Emerson, Hong, Hysell, J. Jacobson, Kaufert, Kirsch, McCarville, Miresse, Neubauer, Sheehan, Sinicki, Stubbs, Subeck, Tenorio, Vining and Prado; 
cosponsored by Senators Roys, Dassler-Alfheim, Carpenter, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Smith, Spreitzer and Wanggaard
